title: How to rank values (highest = 1) with a formula
task: Assign a rank to each number in a list, e.g. 1 for the largest.

excel.note: Descending by default; add ,1 for ascending. RANK.EQ is the modern name.

explanation: RANK(number, range) returns the position of the value if the range were sorted largest-to-smallest. 30 is the 3rd biggest of 10/20/30/40/50, so its rank is 3. Lock the range with $ when filling down.
